title: Silky Sour Tomato Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese dish featuring a silky sauce made with sour tomatoes, garlic, and onions in just one pot for a perfect meal.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: light soy sauce works well with sour flavors

ingredients.name: sour vegetables paste
ingredients.notes: such as tamarind or pineapple puree for the sourness

ingredients.name: peanut oil
ingredients.notes: or any cooking oil of your preference

instructions: Heat peanut oil in a wok or large pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and chopped onions, sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the tomatoes from can, cook for another couple of minutes.
Sprinkle cornstarch into the tomato mixture and stir well to avoid lumps. Cook for a minute more.
Pour in soy sauce and sour vegetables paste, stir well to combine all ingredients.
Add rice vinegar and salt, stir continuously until the sauce thickens slightly, about 2-3 minutes or until desired consistency is achieved.
